modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Audio Jack Error: Repeated Plugged/Unplugged Notifications

full_description_text:  
User reports audio jack issue.  
Computer indicates audio jack is unplugged, then plugged back in repeatedly.  
This occurs during normal operation.  
No additional context provided.
